QueryTheListOfDedicatedLineGateways.etGatewayId: The ID of the dedicated line gateway
QueryTheListOfDedicatedLineGateways.name: The name of the dedicated line gateway, supports fuzzy query
QueryTheListOfDedicatedLineGateways.status: The status of the dedicated line gateway
QueryTheListOfDedicatedLineGateways.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryTheListOfDedicatedLineGateways.maxKeys: The maximum number of items per page, not exceeding 1000. Default value is 1000
